# Vendored third-party assets

These files are redistributed from upstream projects. Netdocs adds only an
attribution header (where applicable); the file contents are otherwise unmodified.

## Material for MkDocs
- Path: `stylesheets/`, `javascripts/bundle.*.min.js`, `javascripts/workers/search.*.min.js`
- Source: https://github.com/squidfunk/mkdocs-material
- Copyright (c) 2016-2025 Martin Donath <martin.donath@squidfunk.com>
- License: MIT — see [../../../../THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES/mkdocs-material.LICENSE](../../../../THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES/mkdocs-material.LICENSE)

## lunr / lunr-languages
- Path: `javascripts/lunr/`
- Sources: https://github.com/olivernn/lunr.js and https://github.com/MihaiValentin/lunr-languages
- Copyright (c) Oliver Nightingale and lunr-languages contributors
- License: MIT (bundled and distributed by Material for MkDocs)
